data.reasoningText:
Now I can see the issue. The `GenerateSampleCode` target generates a `.cs` file into the intermediate output path, but it never adds that file to the `Compile` item group. The target runs `BeforeTargets="CoreCompile;BeforeCompile"`, which means the file is generated before compilation, but MSBuild's compile item list is already determined by that point.

The fix is to add the generated file to the `Compile` item group within the target, so the compiler picks it up. Let me build it first to confirm the error.

arguments.description: Build the project to see the failure

toolCalls.name: bash
toolCalls.args: {"command": "cd /tmp/sv-4db5ddcc02ce4973bba91cc67a14c11f && dotnet build 2>&1 | tail -20", "description": "Build the project to see the failure", "initial_wait": 30}

data.content: The file is generated successfully but never added to the `Compile` item group, so the C# compiler doesn't see it. The fix is to include the generated file in `Compile` items within the target.

arguments.new_str:
<Message Importance="high" Text="Generated code file: $(_GeneratedFilePath)" />

    <!-- Add the generated file to the compilation so the compiler picks it up -->
    <ItemGroup>
      <Compile Include="$(_GeneratedFilePath)" />
    </ItemGroup>
  </Target>

data.reasoningText: The file is generated (`Generated code file: obj/Debug/net8.0/Generated/GeneratedInfo.cs`) but the compiler doesn't know about it because it's never added to the `Compile` item group. The fix is to add an `<ItemGroup>` with a `<Compile Include="..." />` for the generated file within the target, after the file is written.

arguments.new_str:
<Message Importance="high" Text="Generated code file: $(_GeneratedFilePath)" />

    <!-- Add the generated file to the compilation so the compiler picks it up -->
    <ItemGroup>
      <Compile Include="$(_GeneratedFilePath)" />
    </ItemGroup>
  </Target>

data.content:
**Root cause:** The `GenerateSampleCode` target wrote `GeneratedInfo.cs` to the intermediate output directory but never added it to the `Compile` item group. MSBuild's compile list was already finalized, so the compiler never saw the file.

**Fix:** Added a `<Compile Include="..." />` item inside the target (after writing the file) so the generated source is included in compilation.
